name: hacker-news-digest
description: Custom MCP tool for Hacker News: getTopStories returns the front-page stories.

tools.name: getTopStories
tools.description: Reads the Hacker News front page and returns the top stories (rank, title, url, score, comments). Self-contained: if HN isn't open it returns {status:"navigate_required", navigateTo}.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
